creator: rootrider@shellfront.org
text:
built successfully in one of my other jails.. that one is meant for desktop use and has a large amount of extra packages that the first one will never have (as it's more of a lean server build). I'm not sure what the difference is, but I guess this isn't a big issue.

====>> Building devel/git
build started at Tue Dec 27 18:57:18 PST 2016
port directory: /usr/ports/devel/git
building for: FreeBSD 10amd64desktop-default-job-04 10.3-RELEASE-p12 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p12 amd64
maintained by: garga@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/devel/git/Makefile 427879 2016-12-05 12:28:08Z koobs $
Poudriere version: 3.1.14
Host OSVERSION: 1003000
Jail OSVERSION: 1003000

---Begin Environment---

     CONTRIB=off: Install contributed scripts

     HTMLDOCS=off: Install additional documentation
     ICONV=on: Encoding conversion support via iconv
     NLS=on: Native Language Support
     P4=off: Enable Perforce support
     PCRE=on: Use Perl Compatible Regular Expressions
